---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem with PaddiSense
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

**Module affected**
Which module has the issue? (e.g. Weather, HFM, IPM, PWM, ASM)

**PaddiSense version**
Found in Settings view (e.g. 2026.3.17)

**Describe the bug**
What happened? What did you expect to happen?

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Go to ...
2. Tap on ...
3. See error

**Screenshots**
If possible, attach a screenshot showing the issue.
